content: You appear to be stuck on [Contact NeonEcho with a reconnaissance report. Lead with intel: Albireo system mapped (Darksteel Trace has 274 units darksteel ore — rare, strategic value), The Rampart has a Crimson frontier checkpoint with full facilities and defense planets, Fumalsamakah scouted (include whatever was found). Keep it tactical and concise. This is a military report, not a social call.] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
